quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.CfnA:
A filled map.

For more information, see [Creating filled maps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/filled-maps.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.Acti.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.Char.Description: The configuration settings of the visual.

quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.Colu.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.Subt.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.Titl.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.template.filledmapvisual.Visu.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers..
